title: andropogon elliottii f. gracilior
intro: Andropogon elliottii f. gracilior, also known as the Elliott's bluestem, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Andropogon elliottii f. gracilior include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, digestive problems, and respiratory infections.
